1: # mycli 维护与技术手册
2: 
3: ## 1. 文档目的
4: 
5: 这份文档面向后续维护 `mycli` 的技术人员。
6: 
7: 目标是帮助后续继续做这些事情：
8: 
9: - 新增能力包
10: - 调整命令注册结构
11: - 修改帮助展示逻辑
12: - 接入已有外部 CLI
13: - 排查运行时问题
14: 
15: ---
16: 
17: ## 2. 当前目录结构
18: 
19: 当前根目录：
20: 
21: ```text
22: D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli
23: ```
24: 
25: 关键文件：
26: 
27: - `mycli.ps1`
28:   PowerShell 主入口包装器
29: - `mycli.cmd`
30:   Windows 命令行包装器
31: - `common\cli.ps1`
32:   核心运行时实现
33: - `common\requirements.md`
34:   需求与设计收敛文档
35: - `common\user-manual.md`
36:   面向用户的使用手册
37: - `common\technical-manual.md`
38:   本文档
39: 
40: 包目录示例：
41: 
42: ```text
43: mycli\
44:   opencode\
45:     cli.package.json
46:     README.md
47: ```
48: 
49: ---
50: 
51: ## 3. 核心设计模型
52: 
53: `mycli` 的核心对象有 4 类：
54: 
55: - `package`
56:   能力包
57: - `subpackage`
58:   子包，目录即层级
59: - `command`
60:   包内可执行命令
61: - `help`
62:   包级文档，来自 `README.md`
63: 
64: 核心设计原则：
65: 
66: - 包树使用目录结构表示
67: - 每个包目录使用 `cli.package.json` 作为注册中心
68: - 每个包目录使用 `README.md` 作为 `--help` 数据源
69: - `entry` 统一使用绝对路径
70: - 命令参数采用结构化 `args`
71: - 外部 CLI 可以通过“直接转发”或“前缀转发”接入
72: 
73: ---
74: 
75: ## 4. 运行时职责分层
76: 
77: ### `mycli.ps1`
78: 
79: 负责把用户输入传给核心脚本：
80: 
81: - 作为 PowerShell 入口
82: - 调用 `common\cli.ps1`
83: 
84: ### `mycli.cmd`
85: 
86: 负责兼容 `cmd` 场景：
87: 
88: - 作为批处理入口
89: - 再转到 PowerShell 入口
90: 
91: ### `common\cli.ps1`
92: 
93: 这是整个系统的核心。
94: 
95: 主要职责：
96: 
97: - 参数解析
98: - 路径与包定位
99: - 包配置读取与写入
100: - 命令注册与更新
101: - README 帮助读取与写入
102: - 已注册命令的实际执行
103: 
104: ---
105: 
106: ## 5. 包结构约定
107: 
108: 任意包目录都应当至少包含：
109: 
110: - `cli.package.json`
111: - `README.md`
112: 
113: 示例：
114: 
115: ```text
116: D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\opencode\
117:   cli.package.json
118:   README.md
119: ```
120: 
121: 嵌套包示例：
122: 
123: ```text
124: D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\dev\
125:   cli.package.json
126:   README.md
127:   opencli\
128:     cli.package.json
129:     README.md
130: ```
131: 
132: ---
133: 
134: ## 6. `cli.package.json` 结构
135: 
136: 当前最核心字段：
137: 
138: ```json
139: {
140:   "name": "opencode",
141:   "summary": "Forwarding package for the existing opencode CLI",
142:   "source": "D:\\agent_workspace\\projects\\opencode",
143:   "commands": [
144:     {
145:       "name": "run",
146:       "summary": "Run opencode with a message",
147:       "args": [
148:         {
149:           "name": "message",
150:           "required": false,
151:           "summary": "Message to send to opencode",
152:           "type": "string"
153:         }
154:       ],
155:       "prefixArgs": [
156:         "run"
157:       ],
158:       "entry": "C:\\Users\\38188\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\opencode.ps1"
159:     }
160:   ]
161: }
162: ```
163: 
164: 字段说明：
165: 
166: - `name`
167:   包名，通常等于目录名
168: - `summary`
169:   顶层 `list` 或子包展示时的一句话简介
170: - `source`
171:   来源描述，推荐绝对路径，也允许自定义文本
172: - `commands`
173:   命令注册数组
174: 
175: 命令对象字段：
176: 
177: - `name`
178:   命令名
179: - `summary`
180:   命令简介
181: - `args`
182:   结构化参数说明
183: - `entry`
184:   绝对路径入口
185: - `prefixArgs`
186:   可选。固定插入到实际执行前面的参数数组
187: 
188: ---
189: 
190: ## 7. `prefixArgs` 的作用
191: 
192: 这是当前支持“原生 CLI 包装”的关键机制。
193: 
194: ### 直接透传
195: 
196: 例如：
197: 
198: ```json
199: {
200:   "name": "native",
201:   "summary": "Forward all remaining arguments to opencode",
202:   "args": [],
203:   "entry": "C:\\Users\\38188\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\opencode.ps1"
204: }
205: ```
206: 
207: 此时：
208: 
209: ```powershell
210: mycli opencode native run hello
211: ```
212: 
213: 会执行：
214: 
215: ```powershell
216: opencode run hello
217: ```
218: 
219: ### 前缀转发
220: 
221: 例如：
222: 
223: ```json
224: {
225:   "name": "run",
226:   "summary": "Run opencode with a message",
227:   "args": [],
228:   "prefixArgs": ["run"],
229:   "entry": "C:\\Users\\38188\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\opencode.ps1"
230: }
231: ```
232: 
233: 此时：
234: 
235: ```powershell
236: mycli opencode run hello
237: ```
238: 
239: 会执行：
240: 
241: ```powershell
242: opencode run hello
243: ```
244: 
245: 所以：
246: 
247: - `native` 适合原样透传
248: - `prefixArgs` 适合把原生子命令重定义成 `mycli` 的直接命令
249: 
250: ---
251: 
252: ## 8. 当前命令行为
253: 
254: ### 顶层
255: 
256: - `mycli --help`
257: - `mycli list`
258: - `mycli package list`
259: - `mycli package register`
260: - `mycli package register-full`
261: 
262: ### 包级
263: 
264: - `mycli <package> --help`
265: - `mycli <package> list`
266: - `mycli <package> command list`
267: - `mycli <package> command register`
268: - `mycli <package> command register-many`
269: - `mycli <package> command update`
270: - `mycli <package> help update`
271: - `mycli <package> <command> [args...]`
272: 
273: ### 包树
274: 
275: 包树使用空格层级解析，例如：
276: 
277: ```powershell
278: mycli dev opencli list
279: mycli dev opencli command list
280: ```
281: 
282: 注册包时使用路径式：
283: 
284: ```powershell
285: mycli package register dev/opencli --summary "..." --source "..."
286: ```
287: 
288: ---
289: 
290: ## 9. 主要内部函数
291: 
292: 下面这些函数是后续改动时最常碰到的核心点。
293: 
294: ### 路径与包定位
295: 
296: - `Get-PackageSegmentsFromString`
297: - `Get-PackageDirectory`
298: - `Get-PackageConfigPath`
299: - `Get-PackageReadmePath`
300: - `Test-PackageExists`
301: - `Find-PackageMatch`
302: 
303: 用途：
304: 
305: - 把用户输入映射到包目录
306: - 做包层级识别
307: - 读取配置与 README
308: 
309: ### 注册数据标准化
310: 
311: - `Get-OptionalMemberValue`
312: - `ConvertTo-NormalizedCommand`
313: - `Get-JsonValue`
314: 
315: 用途：
316: 
317: - 校验配置
318: - 统一命令对象结构
319: - 解析命令行里传入的 JSON
320: 
321: ### 配置读写
322: 
323: - `New-PackageConfigObject`
324: - `Save-PackageConfig`
325: - `Get-PackageConfig`
326: - `Save-PackageConfigObject`
327: 
328: 用途：
329: 
330: - 生成包模板
331: - 保存更新后的包配置
332: 
333: ### 包注册
334: 
335: - `Ensure-PackageDirectory`
336: - `Ensure-AncestorPackages`
337: - `Register-Package`
338: - `Register-PackageFull`
339: 
340: 用途：
341: 
342: - 自动创建包目录
343: - 自动补祖先包
344: - 生成默认 README
345: 
346: ### 命令管理
347: 
348: - `Add-CommandToPackage`
349: - `Update-CommandInPackage`
350: - `Handle-CommandManagement`
351: 
352: 用途：
353: 
354: - 单命令注册
355: - 批量命令注册
356: - 命令更新
357: 
358: ### 帮助管理
359: 
360: - `New-DefaultReadme`
361: - `Handle-HelpManagement`
362: - `Show-PackageHelp`
363: 
364: 用途：
365: 
366: - 初始化 README
367: - 更新 README
368: - 输出 `--help`
369: 
370: ### 执行链路
371: 
372: - `Invoke-RegisteredCommand`
373: - `Invoke-Cli`
374: 
375: 用途：
376: 
377: - 真正执行注册命令
378: - 顶层路由分发
379: 
380: ---
381: 
382: ## 10. README 与 `--help` 的关系
383: 
384: 当前规则很简单：
385: 
386: - `mycli <package> --help`
387: - `mycli <package>`
388: 
389: 都会读取该包目录下的 `README.md`。
390: 
391: 所以如果你想修改包级帮助，不需要改运行时逻辑，直接：
392: 
393: - 用命令更新 README
394: - 或直接编辑对应包的 `README.md`
395: 
396: 这也是为什么包说明尽量写在 Markdown，而不是 JSON 里。
397: 
398: ---
399: 
400: ## 11. 新增一个包的推荐流程
401: 
402: ### 分步方式
403: 
404: 1. 注册包
405: 
406: ```powershell
407: mycli package register demo/tools --summary "Demo tools" --source "D:\demo"
408: ```
409: 
410: 2. 注册命令
411: 
412: ```powershell
413: mycli demo tools command register hello --summary "Say hello" --entry "D:\demo\hello.ps1" --args "[]"
414: ```
415: 
416: 3. 更新 README
417: 
418: ```powershell
419: mycli demo tools help update --content "# demo tools`n`n## Summary`nDemo tools"
420: ```
421: 
422: ### 一次性方式
423: 
424: ```powershell
425: mycli package register-full demo/tools --summary "Demo tools" --source "D:\demo" --commands "[{""name"":""hello"",""summary"":""Say hello"",""args"":[],""entry"":""D:\\demo\\hello.ps1""}]" --help "# demo tools`n`n## Summary`nDemo tools"
426: ```
427: 
428: ---
429: 
430: ## 12. 接入现有外部 CLI 的推荐方式
431: 
432: 如果已有一个原生 CLI，比如 `opencode`，推荐同时提供两层接法。
433: 
434: ### 第一层：native 原生透传
435: 
436: 保留一个：
437: 
438: - `native`
439: 
440: 示例：
441: 
442: ```json
443: {
444:   "name": "native",
445:   "summary": "Forward all remaining arguments to opencode",
446:   "args": [],
447:   "entry": "C:\\Users\\38188\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\opencode.ps1"
448: }
449: ```
450: 
451: 这样可以保证永远有一条“完整原生能力”的后门。
452: 
453: ### 第二层：常用命令重定义
454: 
455: 把常用子命令注册成 `mycli` 直达命令，例如：
456: 
457: - `run`
458: - `models`
459: - `agent`
460: - `session`
461: 
462: 通过 `prefixArgs` 做映射。
463: 
464: 这套模式适合后续继续接：
465: 
466: - 现有 CLI 工具
467: - Python 脚本入口
468: - Node CLI
469: - PowerShell 工具链
470: 
471: ---
472: 
473: ## 13. 当前已知设计边界
474: 
475: 当前版本有这些边界，后续改动时要心里有数：
476: 
477: - 包级帮助来自 `README.md`，不是结构化帮助系统
478: - 目前没有正式的 `command remove`
479: - 目前不支持 `package remove`
480: - 目前未单独实现 `mycli <package> <command> --help`
481: - 参数校验以“展示和注册约束”为主，不是完整执行期参数解析器
482: - `entry` 必须是绝对路径
483: 
484: 这些不是 bug，而是第一版有意保持简单的边界。
485: 
486: ---
487: 
488: ## 14. 调整时的推荐优先级
489: 
490: 后续如果继续扩展，建议优先顺序是：
491: 
492: 1. 文档先更新
493: 2. 再改 `common\cli.ps1`
494: 3. 再补测试用例
495: 4. 最后批量调整已有包
496: 
497: 这样能减少“运行时变了，但包文档和注册结构还没跟上”的情况。
498: 
499: ---
500: 
501: ## 15. 回归验证建议
502: 
503: 每次改完运行时，至少回归这些命令：
504: 
505: ```powershell
506: mycli --help
507: mycli list
508: mycli package list
509: mycli opencode --help
510: mycli opencode list
511: mycli opencode run --help
512: mycli opencode native run --help
513: ```
514: 
515: 如果动了注册逻辑，再补：
516: 
517: ```powershell
518: mycli package register qa/demo --summary "QA Demo" --source "D:\qa"
519: mycli qa demo command register hello --summary "Hello" --entry "D:\qa\hello.ps1" --args "[]"
520: mycli qa demo help update --content "# qa demo"
521: mycli qa demo list
522: ```
523: 
524: 测试结束后再清理临时包。
525: 

(End of file - total 525 lines)
</content>

- 修改帮助展示逻辑

当前根目录：

1: # mycli
2: 
3: `mycli` 是 `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library` 的统一命令入口。
4: 
5: 它把能力包、脚本、现有 CLI 工具组织成一套可发现、可说明、可执行的命令体系。
6: 
7: ## Usage
8: 
9: ```powershell
10: mycli --help
11: mycli list
12: mycli package list
13: mycli package register <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text>
14: mycli package register-full <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text> --commands <json> --help <markdown>
15: mycli <package...> --help
16: mycli <package...> list
17: mycli <package...> command list
18: mycli <package...> command register <name> --summary <text> --entry <absolute-path> --args <json> [--prefix-args <json>]
19: mycli <package...> command register-many --commands <json>
20: mycli <package...> command update <name> [--summary <text>] [--entry <absolute-path>] [--args <json>] [--prefix-args <json>]
21: mycli <package...> help update --content <markdown>
22: mycli <package...> <command> [args...]
23: ```
24: 
25: ## Core Ideas
26: 
27: - `package`
28:   一个能力包
29: - `subpackage`
30:   包下面的子包，目录即层级
31: - `command`
32:   包里的具体执行动作
33: - `cli.package.json`
34:   包注册中心
35: - `README.md`
36:   包级帮助内容来源
37: 
38: ## Common Flows
39: 
40: 查看所有顶层包：
41: 
42: ```powershell
43: mycli list
44: ```
45: 
46: 查看某个包的完整说明：
47: 
48: ```powershell
49: mycli opencode --help
50: ```
51: 
52: 查看某个包里有哪些子包和命令：
53: 
54: ```powershell
55: mycli opencode list
56: ```
57: 
58: 执行某个命令：
59: 
60: ```powershell
61: mycli opencode run "hello"
62: ```
63: 
64: 查看并使用 workflow 能力：
65: 
66: ```powershell
67: mycli agent-workflow --help
68: mycli agent-workflow list
69: mycli agent-workflow validate D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\agent-system-rules\agent-workflow\examples\script_echo_flow
70: ```
71: 
72: ## opencode Example
73: 
74: `opencode` 目前同时支持两种方式：
75: 
76: 直接映射命令：
77: 
78: ```powershell
79: mycli opencode run "hello"
80: mycli opencode models --help
81: mycli opencode agent --help
82: ```
83: 
84: 原生透传：
85: 
86: ```powershell
87: mycli opencode native --help
88: mycli opencode native run hello
89: mycli opencode native models --help
90: ```
91: 
92: ## agent-workflow Example
93: 
94: `agent-workflow` 适合把多步骤任务建模成可运行、可等待、可审核的 workflow。
95: 
96: ```powershell
97: mycli agent-workflow init D:\agent_workspace\projects\my-flow --workflow-id my_flow --name "My Flow"
98: mycli agent-workflow scaffold D:\agent_workspace\projects\my-flow
99: mycli agent-workflow validate D:\agent_workspace\projects\my-flow
100: mycli agent-workflow graph D:\agent_workspace\projects\my-flow
101: mycli agent-workflow start-run D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\agent-system-rules\agent-workflow\examples\script_echo_flow
102: ```
103: 
104: 单次 agent 调用优先用 `mycli agent-cli run`。
105: 多步骤、可等待、可审核、带运行状态的流程优先用 `mycli agent-workflow ...`。

<content>
1: param(
2:   [Parameter(ValueFromRemainingArguments = $true)]
3:   [string[]]$InputArgs
4: )
5: 
6: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
7: 
8: $ConfigRoot = 'D:\agent_workspace\config'
9: 
10: function Show-Usage {
11:   @"
12: config-cli
13: 
14: Usage:
15:   config-cli --help
16:   config-cli list [--json]
17:   config-cli find <name> [--json]
18:   config-cli validate
19: 
20: Config root:
21:   $ConfigRoot
22: 
23: Contract:
24:   Every *.json config under the config root is detected automatically and must have a top-level description field.
25: 
26: Output fields:
27:   name         Uses top-level name when present; otherwise the relative JSON path without extension.
28:   description  Uses top-level description.
29:   path         Absolute JSON file path.
30: 
31: Notes:
32:   Detection is recursive. New *.json files placed anywhere under $ConfigRoot are included on the next command run.
33: "@
34: }
35: 
36: function Test-JsonPropertyExists {
37:   param(
38:     [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Object,
39:     [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Name
40:   )
41: 
42:   return $null -ne ($Object.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $Name } | Select-Object -First 1)
43: }
44: 
45: function Get-ConfigRecords {
46:   if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $ConfigRoot -PathType Container)) {
47:     throw "Config root not found: $ConfigRoot"
48:   }
49: 
50:   $files = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $ConfigRoot -File -Filter '*.json' -Recurse | Sort-Object FullName
51:   $records = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList
52:   $errors = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList
53: 
54:   foreach ($file in $files) {
55:     try {
56:       $raw = Get-Content -LiteralPath $file.FullName -Raw -Encoding UTF8
57:       $json = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json
58:     } catch {
59:       [void]$errors.Add("Invalid JSON: $($file.FullName) ($($_.Exception.Message))")
60:       continue
61:     }
62: 
63:     if (-not (Test-JsonPropertyExists -Object $json -Name 'description')) {
64:       [void]$errors.Add("Missing top-level description field: $($file.FullName)")
65:       continue
66:     }
67: 
68:     $description = [string]$json.description
69:     if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($description)) {
70:       [void]$errors.Add("Empty top-level description field: $($file.FullName)")
71:       continue
72:     }
73: 
74:     $relativePath = [System.IO.Path]::GetRelativePath($ConfigRoot, $file.FullName)
75:     $name = [System.IO.Path]::ChangeExtension($relativePath, $null).TrimEnd('.')
76:     if ((Test-JsonPropertyExists -Object $json -Name 'name') -and -not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace([string]$json.name)) {
77:       $name = [string]$json.name
78:     }
79: 
80:     [void]$records.Add([pscustomobject]@{
81:       name = $name
82:       description = $description
83:       path = $file.FullName
84:     })
85:   }
86: 
87:   return [pscustomobject]@{
88:     records = @($records)
89:     errors = @($errors)
90:   }
91: }
92: 
93: function Write-Records {
94:   param(
95:     [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Records,
96:     [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$AsJson
97:   )
98: 
99:   $recordList = @($Records)
100: 
101:   if ($AsJson) {
102:     $recordList | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8
103:     return
104:   }
105: 
106:   if ($recordList.Count -eq 0) {
107:     Write-Output 'No configs found.'
108:     return
109:   }
110: 
111:   $recordList | Format-Table -AutoSize name, description, path
112: }
113: 
114: $command = 'list'
115: $remaining = @()
116: if ($InputArgs -and $InputArgs.Count -gt 0) {
117:   $command = $InputArgs[0]
118:   if ($InputArgs.Count -gt 1) {
119:     $remaining = @($InputArgs[1..($InputArgs.Count - 1)])
120:   }
121: }
122: 
123: $asJson = $remaining -contains '--json'
124: $remaining = @($remaining | Where-Object { $_ -ne '--json' })
125: 
126: switch ($command) {
127:   { $_ -in @('--help', '-h', 'help') } {
128:     Show-Usage
129:     exit 0
130:   }
131:   'list' {
132:     $result = Get-ConfigRecords
133:     if ($result.errors.Count -gt 0) {
134:       $result.errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Error $_ }
135:       exit 1
136:     }
137:     Write-Records -Records $result.records -AsJson $asJson
138:     exit 0
139:   }
140:   'find' {
141:     if ($remaining.Count -lt 1 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($remaining[0])) {
142:       throw 'find requires a config name.'
143:     }
144: 
145:     $query = $remaining[0]
146:     $result = Get-ConfigRecords
147:     if ($result.errors.Count -gt 0) {
148:       $result.errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Error $_ }
149:       exit 1
150:     }
151: 
152:     $normalizedQuery = $query -replace '/', '\'
153:     $matches = @($result.records | Where-Object {
154:       $_.name -eq $query -or
155:       $_.name -eq $normalizedQuery -or
156:       [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($_.path) -eq $query
157:     })
158: 
159:     if ($matches.Count -eq 0) {
160:       Write-Error "Config not found: $query"
161:       exit 1
162:     }
163: 
164:     Write-Records -Records $matches -AsJson $asJson
165:     exit 0
166:   }
167:   'validate' {
168:     $result = Get-ConfigRecords
169:     if ($result.errors.Count -gt 0) {
170:       $result.errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Error $_ }
171:       exit 1
172:     }
173:     Write-Output "OK: $($result.records.Count) config(s) valid."
174:     exit 0
175:   }
176:   default {
177:     Write-Error "Unknown command: $command"
178:     Show-Usage
179:     exit 1
180:   }
181: }

(End of file - total 181 lines)
</content>

+param(
+  [Parameter(ValueFromRemainingArguments = $true)]
+  [string[]]$InputArgs
+)
+
+$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
+
+$PackageRoot = Split-Path -Parent (Split-Path -Parent $PSCommandPath)
+$StateRoot = Join-Path $PackageRoot 'state'
+$LogRoot = Join-Path $StateRoot 'logs'
+$RegistryPath = Join-Path $StateRoot 'startup-commands.json'
+$RunnerPath = Join-Path (Join-Path $PackageRoot 'scripts') 'startup.ps1'
+$TaskPath = '\mycli\startup\'
+$TaskName = 'RunRegisteredCommands'
+
+function Show-Usage {
+  @"
+mycli startup
+
+Usage:
+  startup --help
+  startup list [--json]
+  startup add <id> <command...>
+  startup remove <id>
+  startup enable <id>
+  startup disable <id>
+  startup install
+  startup uninstall
+  startup run
+  startup status [--json]
+
+State:
+  registry: $RegistryPath
+  logs:     $LogRoot
+  task:     $TaskPath$TaskName
+
+Notes:
+  'add' stores the command and installs/updates the Windows AtLogOn scheduled task.
+  'run' launches all enabled registered commands asynchronously and writes logs per command.
+"@
+}
+
+function Ensure-StateRoot {
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $StateRoot -PathType Container)) {
+    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $StateRoot -Force | Out-Null
+  }
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $LogRoot -PathType Container)) {
+    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $LogRoot -Force | Out-Null
+  }
+}
+
+function New-EmptyRegistry {
+  [pscustomobject]@{
+    version = 1
+    updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+    commands = @()
+  }
+}
+
+function Read-Registry {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -PathType Leaf)) {
+    return New-EmptyRegistry
+  }
+
+  $raw = Get-Content -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8
+  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($raw)) {
+    return New-EmptyRegistry
+  }
+
+  $registry = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json
+  if ($null -eq $registry.PSObject.Properties['commands']) {
+    $registry | Add-Member -NotePropertyName commands -NotePropertyValue @()
+  }
+  if ($null -eq $registry.PSObject.Properties['version']) {
+    $registry | Add-Member -NotePropertyName version -NotePropertyValue 1
+  }
+  return $registry
+}
+
+function Write-Registry {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Registry)
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $Registry.updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+  $Registry | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -Encoding UTF8
+}
+
+function Get-CommandRecords {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Registry)
+  return @($Registry.commands)
+}
+
+function Test-ValidId {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id)
+  return $Id -match '^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$'
+}
+
+function Get-TaskInfo {
+  try {
+    return Get-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -ErrorAction Stop
+  } catch {
+    return $null
+  }
+}
+
+function Install-StartupTask {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $pwsh = (Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source
+  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pwsh)) {
+    $pwsh = (Get-Command powershell -ErrorAction Stop).Source
+  }
+
+  $argument = "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$RunnerPath`" run"
+  $action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute $pwsh -Argument $argument -WorkingDirectory 'D:\agent_workspace'
+  $trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn -User $env:USERNAME
+  $settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries -MultipleInstances Parallel -StartWhenAvailable
+
+  Register-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -Action $action -Trigger $trigger -Settings $settings -Description 'Run registered mycli startup commands at Windows sign-in.' -Force | Out-Null
+  Write-Output "Installed scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+}
+
+function Uninstall-StartupTask {
+  $task = Get-TaskInfo
+  if ($null -eq $task) {
+    Write-Output "Scheduled task not installed: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+    return
+  }
+  Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -Confirm:$false
+  Write-Output "Uninstalled scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+}
+
+function Write-Records {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Records,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$AsJson
+  )
+
+  $recordList = @($Records)
+  if ($AsJson) {
+    $recordList | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
+    return
+  }
+  if ($recordList.Count -eq 0) {
+    Write-Output 'No startup commands registered.'
+    return
+  }
+  $recordList | Select-Object id, enabled, command, updatedAt | Format-Table -AutoSize
+}
+
+function Add-StartupCommand {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string[]]$Command
+  )
+
+  if (-not (Test-ValidId -Id $Id)) {
+    throw "Invalid id '$Id'. Use only letters, numbers, underscore, dash, and dot."
+  }
+  if ($Command.Count -eq 0) {
+    throw 'add requires a command to register.'
+  }
+
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList
+  foreach ($record in (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry)) {
+    if ($record.id -ne $Id) {
+      [void]$records.Add($record)
+    }
+  }
+
+  $now = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+  [void]$records.Add([pscustomobject]@{
+    id = $Id
+    enabled = $true
+    command = @($Command)
+    createdAt = $now
+    updatedAt = $now
+  })
+
+  $registry.commands = @($records)
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  Install-StartupTask
+  Write-Output "Registered startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Remove-StartupCommand {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id)
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = @((Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) | Where-Object { $_.id -ne $Id })
+  if ($records.Count -eq (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry).Count) {
+    throw "Startup command not found: $Id"
+  }
+  $registry.commands = @($records)
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  Write-Output "Removed startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Set-StartupCommandEnabled {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$Enabled
+  )
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $found = $false
+  foreach ($record in (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry)) {
+    if ($record.id -eq $Id) {
+      $record.enabled = $Enabled
+      $record.updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+      $found = $true
+    }
+  }
+  if (-not $found) {
+    throw "Startup command not found: $Id"
+  }
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  $state = if ($Enabled) { 'Enabled' } else { 'Disabled' }
+  Write-Output "$state startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Start-RegisteredCommands {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = @((Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) | Where-Object { $_.enabled -eq $true })
+  if ($records.Count -eq 0) {
+    Write-Output 'No enabled startup commands to run.'
+    return
+  }
+
+  foreach ($record in $records) {
+    $commandParts = @($record.command)
+    if ($commandParts.Count -eq 0) {
+      Write-Warning "Skipping '$($record.id)': empty command."
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $safeId = ($record.id -replace '[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]', '_')
+    $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'
+    $stdout = Join-Path $LogRoot "$timestamp-$safeId.out.log"
+    $stderr = Join-Path $LogRoot "$timestamp-$safeId.err.log"
+    $exe = $commandParts[0]
+    $args = @()
+    if ($commandParts.Count -gt 1) {
+      $args = @($commandParts[1..($commandParts.Count - 1)])
+    }
+
+    Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList $args -WorkingDirectory 'D:\agent_workspace' -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput $stdout -RedirectStandardError $stderr | Out-Null
+    Write-Output "Started startup command '$($record.id)'. Logs: $stdout ; $stderr"
+  }
+}
+
+function Show-Status {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$AsJson)
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $task = Get-TaskInfo
+  $status = [pscustomobject]@{
+    registryPath = $RegistryPath
+    logRoot = $LogRoot
+    commandCount = @($registry.commands).Count
+    enabledCount = @($registry.commands | Where-Object { $_.enabled -eq $true }).Count
+    scheduledTask = [pscustomobject]@{
+      path = $TaskPath
+      name = $TaskName
+      installed = ($null -ne $task)
+      state = if ($null -ne $task) { [string]$task.State } else { $null }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if ($AsJson) {
+    $status | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
+    return
+  }
+
+  Write-Output "Registry: $($status.registryPath)"
+  Write-Output "Logs: $($status.logRoot)"
+  Write-Output "Commands: $($status.commandCount) total, $($status.enabledCount) enabled"
+  Write-Output "Scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+  Write-Output "Installed: $($status.scheduledTask.installed)"
+  if ($status.scheduledTask.installed) {
+    Write-Output "State: $($status.scheduledTask.state)"
+  }
+}
+
+$command = 'list'
+$remaining = @()
+if ($InputArgs -and $InputArgs.Count -gt 0) {
+  $command = $InputArgs[0]
+  if ($InputArgs.Count -gt 1) {
+    $remaining = @($InputArgs[1..($InputArgs.Count - 1)])
+  }
+}
+
+$asJson = $remaining -contains '--json'
+$remaining = @($remaining | Where-Object { $_ -ne '--json' })
+
+switch ($command) {
+  { $_ -in @('--help', '-h', 'help') } {
+    Show-Usage
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'list' {
+    $registry = Read-Registry
+    Write-Records -Records (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) -AsJson $asJson
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'add' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -lt 2) {
+      throw 'add requires <id> <command...>.'
+    }
+    Add-StartupCommand -Id $remaining[0] -Command @($remaining[1..($remaining.Count - 1)])
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'remove' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'remove requires <id>.' }
+    Remove-StartupCommand -Id $remaining[0]
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'enable' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'enable requires <id>.' }
+    Set-StartupCommandEnabled -Id $remaining[0] -Enabled $true
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'disable' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'disable requires <id>.' }
+    Set-StartupCommandEnabled -Id $remaining[0] -Enabled $false
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'install' {
+    Install-StartupTask
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'uninstall' {
+    Uninstall-StartupTask
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'run' {
+    Start-RegisteredCommands
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'status' {
+    Show-Status -AsJson $asJson
+    exit 0
+  }
+  default {
+    Write-Error "Unknown command: $command"
+    Show-Usage
+    exit 1
+  }
+}

+
+function Ensure-StateRoot {
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $StateRoot -PathType Container)) {
+    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $StateRoot -Force | Out-Null
+  }
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $LogRoot -PathType Container)) {
+    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $LogRoot -Force | Out-Null
+  }
+}
+
+function New-EmptyRegistry {
+  [pscustomobject]@{
+    version = 1
+    updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+    commands = @()
+  }
+}
+
+function Read-Registry {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -PathType Leaf)) {
+    return New-EmptyRegistry
+  }
+
+  $raw = Get-Content -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8
+  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($raw)) {
+    return New-EmptyRegistry
+  }
+
+  $registry = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json
+  if ($null -eq $registry.PSObject.Properties['commands']) {
+    $registry | Add-Member -NotePropertyName commands -NotePropertyValue @()
+  }
+  if ($null -eq $registry.PSObject.Properties['version']) {
+    $registry | Add-Member -NotePropertyName version -NotePropertyValue 1
+  }
+  return $registry
+}
+
+function Write-Registry {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Registry)
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $Registry.updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+  $Registry | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content -LiteralPath $RegistryPath -Encoding UTF8
+}
+
+function Get-CommandRecords {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Registry)
+  return @($Registry.commands)
+}
+
+function Test-ValidId {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id)
+  return $Id -match '^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$'
+}
+
+function Get-TaskInfo {
+  try {
+    return Get-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -ErrorAction Stop
+  } catch {
+    return $null
+  }
+}
+
+function Install-StartupTask {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $pwsh = (Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source
+  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pwsh)) {
+    $pwsh = (Get-Command powershell -ErrorAction Stop).Source
+  }
+
+  $argument = "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$RunnerPath`" run"
+  $action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute $pwsh -Argument $argument -WorkingDirectory 'D:\agent_workspace'
+  $trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogOn -User $env:USERNAME
+  $settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries -MultipleInstances Parallel -StartWhenAvailable
+
+  Register-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -Action $action -Trigger $trigger -Settings $settings -Description 'Run registered mycli startup commands at Windows sign-in.' -Force | Out-Null
+  Write-Output "Installed scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+}
+
+function Uninstall-StartupTask {
+  $task = Get-TaskInfo
+  if ($null -eq $task) {
+    Write-Output "Scheduled task not installed: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+    return
+  }
+  Unregister-ScheduledTask -TaskPath $TaskPath -TaskName $TaskName -Confirm:$false
+  Write-Output "Uninstalled scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+}
+
+function Write-Records {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]$Records,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$AsJson
+  )
+
+  $recordList = @($Records)
+  if ($AsJson) {
+    $recordList | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
+    return
+  }
+  if ($recordList.Count -eq 0) {
+    Write-Output 'No startup commands registered.'
+    return
+  }
+  $recordList | Select-Object id, enabled, command, updatedAt | Format-Table -AutoSize
+}
+
+function Add-StartupCommand {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string[]]$Command
+  )
+
+  if (-not (Test-ValidId -Id $Id)) {
+    throw "Invalid id '$Id'. Use only letters, numbers, underscore, dash, and dot."
+  }
+  if ($Command.Count -eq 0) {
+    throw 'add requires a command to register.'
+  }
+
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList
+  foreach ($record in (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry)) {
+    if ($record.id -ne $Id) {
+      [void]$records.Add($record)
+    }
+  }
+
+  $now = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+  [void]$records.Add([pscustomobject]@{
+    id = $Id
+    enabled = $true
+    command = @($Command)
+    createdAt = $now
+    updatedAt = $now
+  })
+
+  $registry.commands = @($records)
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  Install-StartupTask
+  Write-Output "Registered startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Remove-StartupCommand {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id)
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = @((Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) | Where-Object { $_.id -ne $Id })
+  if ($records.Count -eq (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry).Count) {
+    throw "Startup command not found: $Id"
+  }
+  $registry.commands = @($records)
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  Write-Output "Removed startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Set-StartupCommandEnabled {
+  param(
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Id,
+    [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$Enabled
+  )
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $found = $false
+  foreach ($record in (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry)) {
+    if ($record.id -eq $Id) {
+      $record.enabled = $Enabled
+      $record.updatedAt = (Get-Date).ToString('o')
+      $found = $true
+    }
+  }
+  if (-not $found) {
+    throw "Startup command not found: $Id"
+  }
+  Write-Registry -Registry $registry
+  $state = if ($Enabled) { 'Enabled' } else { 'Disabled' }
+  Write-Output "$state startup command: $Id"
+}
+
+function Start-RegisteredCommands {
+  Ensure-StateRoot
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $records = @((Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) | Where-Object { $_.enabled -eq $true })
+  if ($records.Count -eq 0) {
+    Write-Output 'No enabled startup commands to run.'
+    return
+  }
+
+  foreach ($record in $records) {
+    $commandParts = @($record.command)
+    if ($commandParts.Count -eq 0) {
+      Write-Warning "Skipping '$($record.id)': empty command."
+      continue
+    }
+
+    $safeId = ($record.id -replace '[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]', '_')
+    $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'
+    $stdout = Join-Path $LogRoot "$timestamp-$safeId.out.log"
+    $stderr = Join-Path $LogRoot "$timestamp-$safeId.err.log"
+    $exe = $commandParts[0]
+    $args = @()
+    if ($commandParts.Count -gt 1) {
+      $args = @($commandParts[1..($commandParts.Count - 1)])
+    }
+
+    Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList $args -WorkingDirectory 'D:\agent_workspace' -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput $stdout -RedirectStandardError $stderr | Out-Null
+    Write-Output "Started startup command '$($record.id)'. Logs: $stdout ; $stderr"
+  }
+}
+
+function Show-Status {
+  param([Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][bool]$AsJson)
+  $registry = Read-Registry
+  $task = Get-TaskInfo
+  $status = [pscustomobject]@{
+    registryPath = $RegistryPath
+    logRoot = $LogRoot
+    commandCount = @($registry.commands).Count
+    enabledCount = @($registry.commands | Where-Object { $_.enabled -eq $true }).Count
+    scheduledTask = [pscustomobject]@{
+      path = $TaskPath
+      name = $TaskName
+      installed = ($null -ne $task)
+      state = if ($null -ne $task) { [string]$task.State } else { $null }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if ($AsJson) {
+    $status | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
+    return
+  }
+
+  Write-Output "Registry: $($status.registryPath)"
+  Write-Output "Logs: $($status.logRoot)"
+  Write-Output "Commands: $($status.commandCount) total, $($status.enabledCount) enabled"
+  Write-Output "Scheduled task: $TaskPath$TaskName"
+  Write-Output "Installed: $($status.scheduledTask.installed)"
+  if ($status.scheduledTask.installed) {
+    Write-Output "State: $($status.scheduledTask.state)"
+  }
+}
+
+$command = 'list'
+$remaining = @()
+if ($InputArgs -and $InputArgs.Count -gt 0) {
+  $command = $InputArgs[0]
+  if ($InputArgs.Count -gt 1) {
+    $remaining = @($InputArgs[1..($InputArgs.Count - 1)])
+  }
+}
+
+$asJson = $remaining -contains '--json'
+$remaining = @($remaining | Where-Object { $_ -ne '--json' })
+
+switch ($command) {
+  { $_ -in @('--help', '-h', 'help') } {
+    Show-Usage
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'list' {
+    $registry = Read-Registry
+    Write-Records -Records (Get-CommandRecords -Registry $registry) -AsJson $asJson
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'add' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -lt 2) {
+      throw 'add requires <id> <command...>.'
+    }
+    Add-StartupCommand -Id $remaining[0] -Command @($remaining[1..($remaining.Count - 1)])
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'remove' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'remove requires <id>.' }
+    Remove-StartupCommand -Id $remaining[0]
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'enable' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'enable requires <id>.' }
+    Set-StartupCommandEnabled -Id $remaining[0] -Enabled $true
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'disable' {
+    if ($remaining.Count -ne 1) { throw 'disable requires <id>.' }
+    Set-StartupCommandEnabled -Id $remaining[0] -Enabled $false
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'install' {
+    Install-StartupTask
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'uninstall' {
+    Uninstall-StartupTask
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'run' {
+    Start-RegisteredCommands
+    exit 0
+  }
+  'status' {
+    Show-Status -AsJson $asJson
+    exit 0
+  }
+  default {
+    Write-Error "Unknown command: $command"
+    Show-Usage
+    exit 1
+  }
+}

===================================================================
--- D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\README.md
+++ D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+# mycli startup
+
+`mycli startup` 管理“开机启动命令注册表”。所有注册并启用的命令都会在当前 Windows 用户登录时由一个计划任务统一启动。
+
+## Usage
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup --help
+mycli startup list [--json]
+mycli startup add <id> <command...>
+mycli startup remove <id>
+mycli startup enable <id>
+mycli startup disable <id>
+mycli startup install
+mycli startup uninstall
+mycli startup run
+mycli startup status [--json]
+mycli startup native <args...>
+```
+
+## How it works
+
+- 注册表文件：`D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\startup-commands.json`
+- 日志目录：`D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\logs\`
+- Windows 计划任务名：`\mycli\startup\RunRegisteredCommands`
+- `add` 会写入注册表并自动 `install` 计划任务。
+- `run` 会按注册顺序启动所有 `enabled=true` 的命令；每条命令异步启动，输出写入日志文件。
+
+## Examples
+
+注册一个命令：
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup add task-hall-recover mycli task-hall lifecycle-wake --reason startup-recover --cwd D:\agent_workspace
+```
+
+查看已注册命令：
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup list
+```
+
+立即模拟开机启动执行：
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup run
+```
+
+禁用但保留记录：
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup disable task-hall-recover
+```
+
+删除记录：
+
+```powershell
+mycli startup remove task-hall-recover
+```
+
+## Notes
+
+- 这里的“开机启动”使用 Windows Task Scheduler 的当前用户 `AtLogOn` 触发器。
+- 请只注册幂等、可重复启动的命令；避免注册会阻塞很久的前台交互命令。
+- 涉及部署、删除、推送、外部消息发送等高风险命令时，仍需用户明确授权。

175:     }
176: 
177:     $argsValue = @()
178:     if ($null -ne $Command.args) {
179:         $argsValue = @($Command.args)
180:     }
181:     $prefixArgsValue = @()
182:     $rawPrefixArgs = Get-OptionalMemberValue -InputObject $Command -Name "prefixArgs"
183:     if ($null -ne $rawPrefixArgs) {
184:         $prefixArgsValue = @($rawPrefixArgs)
185:     }
186: 
187:     foreach ($arg in $argsValue) {
188:         if (-not $arg.name) {
189:             Write-CliError "Command '$($Command.name)' has an argument without 'name'."
190:         }
191:         if ($null -eq $arg.required) {
192:             Write-CliError "Command '$($Command.name)' argument '$($arg.name)' requires 'required'."
193:         }
194:         if (-not $arg.summary) {
195:             Write-CliError "Command '$($Command.name)' argument '$($arg.name)' requires 'summary'."
196:         }
197:     }
198:     foreach ($prefixArg in $prefixArgsValue) {
199:         if ($null -eq $prefixArg) {
200:             Write-CliError "Command '$($Command.name)' prefixArgs cannot contain null."
201:         }
202:     }
203: 
204:     return [ordered]@{
205:         name = [string]$Command.name
206:         summary = [string]$Command.summary
207:         args = @($argsValue | ForEach-Object {
208:             $typeValue = Get-OptionalMemberValue -InputObject $_ -Name "type"
209:             $defaultValue = Get-OptionalMemberValue -InputObject $_ -Name "default"
210:             [ordered]@{
211:                 name = [string]$_.name
212:                 required = [bool]$_.required
213:                 summary = [string]$_.summary
214:                 type = if ($null -ne $typeValue) { [string]$typeValue } else { $null }
215:                 default = $defaultValue
216:             }
217:         })
218:         prefixArgs = @($prefixArgsValue | ForEach-Object { [string]$_ })
219:         entry = [string]$Command.entry
220:     }
221: }

223: function Get-JsonValue {
224:     param(
225:         [hashtable]$Options,
226:         [string]$Name,
227:         [switch]$Required,
228:         [switch]$ArrayExpected
229:     )
230: 
231:     if (-not $Options.ContainsKey($Name)) {
232:         if ($Required) {
233:             Write-CliError "Missing required option --$Name."
234:         }
235:         return $null
236:     }
237: 
238:     try {
239:         $value = $Options[$Name] | ConvertFrom-Json
240:     } catch {
241:         Write-CliError "Option --$Name must be valid JSON. $($_.Exception.Message)"
242:     }
243: 
244:     if ($ArrayExpected) {
245:         if ($value -is [string]) {
246:             Write-CliError "Option --$Name must be a JSON array."
247:         }
248: 
249:         if ($value -is [System.Array]) {
250:             return $value
251:         }
252: 
253:         return @($value)
254:     }
255: 
256:     return $value
257: }

363: function Ensure-AncestorPackages {
364:     param(
365:         [string[]]$Segments,
366:         [string]$Source
367:     )
368: 
369:     if ($Segments.Count -le 1) {
370:         return
371:     }
372: 
373:     for ($i = 1; $i -lt $Segments.Count; $i++) {
374:         $ancestorSegments = $Segments[0..($i - 1)]
375:         if (Test-PackageExists -Segments $ancestorSegments) {
376:             continue
377:         }
378: 
379:         Ensure-PackageDirectory -Segments $ancestorSegments
380:         $ancestorSummary = "Container package for $($ancestorSegments[-1])"
381:         $ancestorConfig = New-PackageConfigObject -Segments $ancestorSegments -Summary $ancestorSummary -Source $Source -Commands @()
382:         Save-PackageConfig -Segments $ancestorSegments -Config $ancestorConfig
383: 
384:         $ancestorReadmePath = Get-PackageReadmePath -Segments $ancestorSegments
385:         if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $ancestorReadmePath)) {
386:             Write-Utf8Text -Path $ancestorReadmePath -Content (New-DefaultReadme -Segments $ancestorSegments -Summary $ancestorSummary -Source $Source)
387:         }
388:     }
389: }

391: function Register-Package {
392:     param(
393:         [string[]]$Segments,
394:         [string]$Summary,
395:         [string]$Source,
396:         [object[]]$Commands = @(),
397:         [string]$HelpContent
398:     )
399: 
400:     if (Test-PackageExists -Segments $Segments) {
401:         Write-CliError "Package '$($Segments -join ' ')' is already registered."
402:     }
403: 
404:     Ensure-AncestorPackages -Segments $Segments -Source $Source
405:     Ensure-PackageDirectory -Segments $Segments
406: 
407:     $normalizedCommands = @($Commands | ForEach-Object { ConvertTo-NormalizedCommand -Command $_ })
408:     $config = New-PackageConfigObject -Segments $Segments -Summary $Summary -Source $Source -Commands $normalizedCommands
409:     Save-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments -Config $config
410: 
411:     $readmePath = Get-PackageReadmePath -Segments $Segments
412:     if ($PSBoundParameters.ContainsKey("HelpContent") -and $null -ne $HelpContent) {
413:         Write-Utf8Text -Path $readmePath -Content $HelpContent
414:     } elseif (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $readmePath)) {
415:         Write-Utf8Text -Path $readmePath -Content (New-DefaultReadme -Segments $Segments -Summary $Summary -Source $Source)
416:     }
417: 
418:     Write-Output "Registered package '$($Segments -join ' ')'."
419: }

421: function Get-TopLevelPackageSegments {
422:     $dirs = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $Script:CliRoot -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "common" }
423:     $results = @()
424:     foreach ($dir in $dirs) {
425:         $configPath = Join-Path $dir.FullName $Script:PackageFileName
426:         if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $configPath) {
427:             $results += ,@($dir.Name)
428:         }
429:     }
430:     return $results

433: function Get-SubpackageSegments {
434:     param([string[]]$ParentSegments)

436:     $parentDir = Get-PackageDirectory -Segments $ParentSegments
437:     if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $parentDir)) {
438:         return @()

442:     $results = @()

445:         if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $configPath) {
446:             $results += ,($ParentSegments + $dir.Name)

448:     }
449:     return @($results)

452: function Format-ArgsSignature {
453:     param([object[]]$ArgItems)
454: 
455:     $ArgItems = @($ArgItems)
456:     if (-not $ArgItems -or $ArgItems.Count -eq 0) {
457:         return "(none)"
458:     }
459: 
460:     $parts = foreach ($arg in $ArgItems) {
461:         if ($arg.required) {
462:             "<$($arg.name)>"
463:         } else {
464:             "[$($arg.name)]"
465:         }
466:     }
467:     return ($parts -join " ")
468: }

470: function Format-ArgDescriptions {
471:     param([object[]]$ArgItems)
472: 
473:     $ArgItems = @($ArgItems)
474:     if (-not $ArgItems -or $ArgItems.Count -eq 0) {
475:         return "(none)"
476:     }
477: 
478:     return (($ArgItems | ForEach-Object {
479:         $pieces = @()
480:         $pieces += $_.name
481:         $pieces += if ($_.required) { "required" } else { "optional" }
482:         $pieces += $_.summary
483:         if ($_.type) {
484:             $pieces += "type=$($_.type)"
485:         }
486:         if ($null -ne $_.default -and "$($_.default)" -ne "") {
487:             $pieces += "default=$($_.default)"
488:         }
489:         ($pieces -join ", ")
490:     }) -join "; ")
491: }

528: function Show-PackageList {
529:     param([string[]]$Segments)
530: 
531:     $subpackages = @(Get-SubpackageSegments -ParentSegments $Segments)
532:     $config = Get-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments
533:     $commands = @($config.commands)
534: 
535:     Write-Output "Subpackages"
536:     Write-Output "-----------"
537:     if ($subpackages.Count -eq 0) {
538:         Write-Output "(none)"
539:     } else {
540:         foreach ($subpackage in $subpackages) {
541:             $subConfig = Get-PackageConfig -Segments $subpackage
542:             Write-Output ("{0} - {1}" -f $subpackage[-1], $subConfig.summary)
543:         }
544:     }
545: 
546:     Write-Output ""
547:     Write-Output "Commands"
548:     Write-Output "--------"
549:     if ($commands.Count -eq 0) {
550:         Write-Output "(none)"
551:         return
552:     }
553: 
554:     foreach ($command in $commands) {
555:         Write-Output ("{0}" -f $command.name)
556:         Write-Output ("  Summary: {0}" -f $command.summary)
557:         Write-Output ("  Args: {0}" -f (Format-ArgsSignature -ArgItems $command.args))
558:         Write-Output ("  Arg Details: {0}" -f (Format-ArgDescriptions -ArgItems $command.args))
559:     }

584: function Find-PackageMatch {
585:     param([string[]]$Tokens)
586: 
587:     $Tokens = if ($null -eq $Tokens) { @() } else { @($Tokens) }
588:     $bestCount = 0
589:     for ($i = 1; $i -le $Tokens.Count; $i++) {
590:         $segments = $Tokens[0..($i - 1)]
591:         if (Test-PackageExists -Segments $segments) {
592:             $bestCount = $i
593:             continue
594:         }
595: 
596:         # As soon as a longer prefix stops matching a registered package,
597:         # the remaining tokens belong to package actions, command names, or args.
598:         if ($bestCount -gt 0) {
599:             break
600:         }
601: 
602:         # Package paths always start at the first token, so if the first segment
603:         # is not a package there is no need to keep scanning.
604:         break
605:     }
606: 
607:     if ($bestCount -eq 0) {
608:         return $null
609:     }
610: 
611:     return [ordered]@{
612:         Segments = [string[]]$Tokens[0..($bestCount - 1)]
613:         Remaining = @(
614:             if ($bestCount -lt $Tokens.Count) {
615:                 $Tokens[$bestCount..($Tokens.Count - 1)]
616:             }
617:         )
618:     }
619: }

621: function Add-CommandToPackage {
622:     param(
623:         [string[]]$Segments,
624:         [hashtable]$CommandData
625:     )
626: 
627:     $config = Get-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments
628:     if ($config.commands | Where-Object { $_.name -eq $CommandData.name }) {
629:         Write-CliError "Command '$($CommandData.name)' already exists in package '$($Segments -join ' ')'."
630:     }
631: 
632:     $config.commands += ,$CommandData
633:     Save-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments -Config $config
634:     Write-Output "Registered command '$($CommandData.name)' in package '$($Segments -join ' ')'."
635: }

637: function Update-CommandInPackage {
638:     param(
639:         [string[]]$Segments,
640:         [string]$CommandName,
641:         [hashtable]$Options
642:     )
643: 
644:     $config = Get-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments
645:     $command = $config.commands | Where-Object { $_.name -eq $CommandName } | Select-Object -First 1
646:     if (-not $command) {
647:         Write-CliError "Command '$CommandName' was not found in package '$($Segments -join ' ')'."
648:     }
649: 
650:     if ($Options.ContainsKey("summary")) {
651:         $command.summary = [string]$Options["summary"]
652:     }
653:     if ($Options.ContainsKey("entry")) {
654:         if (-not [System.IO.Path]::IsPathRooted([string]$Options["entry"])) {
655:             Write-CliError "Option --entry must be an absolute path."
656:         }
657:         $command.entry = [string]$Options["entry"]
658:     }
659:     if ($Options.ContainsKey("prefix-args")) {
660:         $prefixArgs = Get-JsonValue -Options $Options -Name "prefix-args" -ArrayExpected
661:         $command.prefixArgs = @($prefixArgs | ForEach-Object { [string]$_ })
662:     }
663:     if ($Options.ContainsKey("args")) {
664:         $parsedArgs = Get-JsonValue -Options $Options -Name "args" -ArrayExpected
665:         $command.args = @($parsedArgs | ForEach-Object {
666:             if (-not $_.name) {
667:                 Write-CliError "Each argument in --args must contain 'name'."
668:             }
669:             if ($null -eq $_.required) {
670:                 Write-CliError "Argument '$($_.name)' in --args requires 'required'."
671:             }
672:             if (-not $_.summary) {
673:                 Write-CliError "Argument '$($_.name)' in --args requires 'summary'."
674:             }
675:             $typeValue = Get-OptionalMemberValue -InputObject $_ -Name "type"
676:             $defaultValue = Get-OptionalMemberValue -InputObject $_ -Name "default"
677:             [ordered]@{
678:                 name = [string]$_.name
679:                 required = [bool]$_.required
680:                 summary = [string]$_.summary
681:                 type = if ($null -ne $typeValue) { [string]$typeValue } else { $null }
682:                 default = $defaultValue
683:             }
684:         })
685:     }
686: 
687:     $config.commands = @($config.commands | ForEach-Object {
688:         if ($_.name -eq $CommandName) {
689:             ConvertTo-NormalizedCommand -Command $command
690:         } else {
691:             ConvertTo-NormalizedCommand -Command $_
692:         }
693:     })
694: 
695:     Save-PackageConfig -Segments $Segments -Config $config
696:     Write-Output "Updated command '$CommandName' in package '$($Segments -join ' ')'."
697: }

699: function Handle-PackageManagement {
700:     param([string[]]$Tokens)
701: 
702:     $Tokens = if ($null -eq $Tokens) { @() } else { @($Tokens) }
703:     if ($Tokens.Count -eq 0 -or $Tokens[0] -eq "--help") {
704:         @"
705: Package management
706: 
707: Usage:
708:   mycli package list
709:   mycli package register <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text>
710:   mycli package register-full <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text> --commands <json> --help <markdown>
711: "@ | Write-Output
712:         return
713:     }
714: 
715:     $action = $Tokens[0]
716:     $remainingTokens = if ($Tokens.Count -gt 1) { @($Tokens[1..($Tokens.Count - 1)]) } else { @() }
717:     $bundle = Get-OptionBundle -Tokens $remainingTokens
718:     $positionals = $bundle.Positionals
719:     $options = $bundle.Options
720: 
721:     switch ($action) {
722:         "list" {
723:             Show-RootPackages
724:         }
725:         "register" {
726:             if ($options.ContainsKey("help") -and $positionals.Count -eq 0) {
727:                 Write-Output "Usage: mycli package register <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text>"
728:                 return
729:             }
730:             if ($positionals.Count -lt 1) {
731:                 Write-CliError "Usage: mycli package register <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text>"
732:             }
733:             if (-not $options.ContainsKey("summary") -or -not $options.ContainsKey("source")) {
734:                 Write-CliError "Package registration requires --summary and --source."
735:             }
736:             Register-Package -Segments (Get-PackageSegmentsFromString -PackagePath $positionals[0]) -Summary ([string]$options["summary"]) -Source ([string]$options["source"])
737:         }
738:         "register-full" {
739:             if ($options.ContainsKey("help") -and $positionals.Count -eq 0) {
740:                 Write-Output "Usage: mycli package register-full <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text> --commands <json> --help <markdown>"
741:                 return
742:             }
743:             if ($positionals.Count -lt 1) {
744:                 Write-CliError "Usage: mycli package register-full <package/path> --summary <text> --source <text> --commands <json> --help <markdown>"
745:             }
746:             foreach ($requiredName in @("summary", "source", "commands", "help")) {
747:                 if (-not $options.ContainsKey($requiredName)) {
748:                     Write-CliError "Package register-full requires --$requiredName."
749:                 }
750:             }
751:             $commands = Get-JsonValue -Options $options -Name "commands" -Required -ArrayExpected
752:             Register-Package -Segments (Get-PackageSegmentsFromString -PackagePath $positionals[0]) -Summary ([string]$options["summary"]) -Source ([string]$options["source"]) -Commands @($commands) -HelpContent ([string]$options["help"])
753:         }
754:         default {
755:             Write-CliError "Unknown package action '$action'."
756:         }
757:     }
758: }
759: 
760: function Handle-CommandManagement {
761:     param(
762:         [string[]]$PackageSegments,
763:         [string[]]$Tokens
764:     )
765: 
766:     $Tokens = if ($null -eq $Tokens) { @() } else { @($Tokens) }
767:     if ($Tokens.Count -eq 0 -or $Tokens[0] -eq "--help") {
768:         @"
769: Command management for package '$($PackageSegments -join ' ')'
770: 
771: Usage:
772:   mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command list
773:   mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command register <name> --summary <text> --entry <absolute-path> --args <json> [--prefix-args <json>]
774:   mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command register-many --commands <json>
775:   mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command update <name> [--summary <text>] [--entry <absolute-path>] [--args <json>] [--prefix-args <json>]
776: "@ | Write-Output
777:         return
778:     }
779: 
780:     $action = $Tokens[0]
781:     $remaining = if ($Tokens.Count -gt 1) { $Tokens[1..($Tokens.Count - 1)] } else { @() }
782:     $bundle = Get-OptionBundle -Tokens $remaining
783:     $positionals = $bundle.Positionals
784:     $options = $bundle.Options
785: 
786:     switch ($action) {
787:         "list" {
788:             Show-CommandList -Segments $PackageSegments
789:         }
790:         "register" {
791:             if ($options.ContainsKey("help")) {
792:                 Write-Output "Usage: mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command register <name> --summary <text> --entry <absolute-path> --args <json> [--prefix-args <json>]"
793:                 return
794:             }
795:             if ($positionals.Count -lt 1) {
796:                 Write-CliError "Usage: mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command register <name> --summary <text> --entry <absolute-path> --args <json> [--prefix-args <json>]"
797:             }
798:             foreach ($requiredName in @("summary", "entry", "args")) {
799:                 if (-not $options.ContainsKey($requiredName)) {
800:                     Write-CliError "Command registration requires --$requiredName."
801:                 }
802:             }
803:             $parsedArgs = Get-JsonValue -Options $options -Name "args" -Required -ArrayExpected
804:             $commandData = ConvertTo-NormalizedCommand -Command ([ordered]@{
805:                 name = $positionals[0]
806:                 summary = [string]$options["summary"]
807:                 args = @($parsedArgs)
808:                 prefixArgs = if ($options.ContainsKey("prefix-args")) { @((Get-JsonValue -Options $options -Name "prefix-args" -ArrayExpected)) } else { @() }
809:                 entry = [string]$options["entry"]
810:             })
811:             Add-CommandToPackage -Segments $PackageSegments -CommandData $commandData
812:         }

819:                 Write-CliError "Usage: mycli $($PackageSegments -join ' ') command register-many --commands <json>"
820:             }
821:             $commands = @((Get-JsonValue -Options $options -Name "commands" -Required -ArrayExpected))
822:             foreach ($command in $commands) {

833:             }

855: "@ | Write-Output

857:     }

861:

state.output:
# mycli startup

`mycli startup` 管理“开机启动命令注册表”。所有注册并启用的命令都会在当前 Windows 用户登录时由一个计划任务统一启动。

## Usage

```powershell
mycli startup --help
mycli startup commands [--json]
mycli startup add <id> <command...>
mycli startup remove <id>
mycli startup enable <id>
mycli startup disable <id>
mycli startup install
mycli startup uninstall
mycli startup run
mycli startup status [--json]
mycli startup native <args...>
```

注意：`mycli startup list` 是 mycli 的包级内置命令清单；要查看已注册的开机启动命令，请使用 `mycli startup commands` 或 `mycli startup native list`。

## How it works

- 注册表文件：`D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\startup-commands.json`
- 日志目录：`D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\logs\`
- Windows 计划任务名：`\mycli\startup\RunRegisteredCommands`
- `add` 会写入注册表并自动 `install` 计划任务。
- `run` 会按注册顺序启动所有 `enabled=true` 的命令；每条命令异步启动，输出写入日志文件。

## Examples

注册一个命令：

```powershell
mycli startup add task-hall-recover mycli task-hall lifecycle-wake --reason startup-recover --cwd D:\agent_workspace
```

查看已注册命令：

```powershell
mycli startup list
```

或：

```powershell
mycli startup commands
```

立即模拟开机启动执行：

```powershell
mycli startup run
```

禁用但保留记录：

```powershell
mycli startup disable task-hall-recover
```

删除记录：

```powershell
mycli startup remove task-hall-recover
```

## Notes

- 这里的“开机启动”使用 Windows Task Scheduler 的当前用户 `AtLogOn` 触发器。
- 请只注册幂等、可重复启动的命令；避免注册会阻塞很久的前台交互命令。
- 涉及部署、删除、推送、外部消息发送等高风险命令时，仍需用户明确授权。

- 涉及部署、删除、推送、外部消息发送等高风险命令时，仍需用户明确授权。

part.text:
千束，已在 `mycli` 里新增并注册了开机启动子包：`mycli startup`。

完成内容：

- 新增包目录：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\`
- 新增注册文件：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\cli.package.json`
- 新增帮助文档：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\README.md`
- 新增实现脚本：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\scripts\startup.ps1`
- 更新顶层帮助：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\README.md`

现在可用命令：

```powershell
mycli startup --help
mycli startup commands
mycli startup add <id> <command...>
mycli startup remove <id>
mycli startup enable <id>
mycli startup disable <id>
mycli startup install
mycli startup uninstall
mycli startup run
mycli startup status
mycli startup native <args...>
```

设计行为：

- `mycli startup add ...` 会把命令注册到启动注册表，并自动安装/更新 Windows 登录启动计划任务。
- 开机/登录时会运行计划任务：
  - `\mycli\startup\RunRegisteredCommands`
- 计划任务会调用：
  - `mycli startup run`
- `run` 会异步启动所有 `enabled=true` 的注册命令，并把日志写到：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\logs\`
- 注册表位置：
  - `D:\agent_workspace\capability-library\mycli\startup\state\startup-commands.json`

示例用法：

```powershell
mycli startup add task-hall-recover mycli task-hall lifecycle-wake --reason startup-recover --cwd D:\agent_workspace
mycli startup commands
mycli startup status
```

已验证：

```powershell
mycli list
mycli startup --help
mycli startup command list
mycli startup commands
mycli startup status
mycli startup run
```

结果正常。当前没有实际注册任何开机启动命令，也没有创建注册表文件；只有在执行 `mycli startup add ...` 或 `install` 时才会真正写状态/装计划任务。
